member.name: T:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService
member.summary: Defines the contract for category management operations.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.GetAllAsync
member.returns: A Result containing a collection of all categories.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a single category by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category.
member.returns: A Result containing the category data if found.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.AddAsync(Core.DTOs.CategoryDto)
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.UpdateAsync(Core.DTOs.CategoryDto)
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a service category by its ID.
member.param: The unique identifier of the category to delete.
member.returns: A Result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Core.Interfaces.Service.ICategoryService.GetTopThreeCategory
member.summary: Retrieves the top three categories with the highest number of maintenance requests.
member.returns: A Result containing a collection of the top three categories with their request counts.
